programme.title: Loving Leah
programme.desc: When Leah's husband Benjamin dies suddenly, Benjamin's brother Jake is stunned to learn he is expected to marry Leah to carry on the name. Jake suggests to Leah that they get married and maintain a secretly platonic relationship.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: Maddie is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, Maddie's luck begins to turn around in all aspects of her life. But then her first love Nate unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: Falling for You
programme.desc: Radio host Lacey is hosting a bachelor bakeoff to raise money to save the radio station. When her star bachelor backs out, she enlists visiting businessman Zac to fill the spot.

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Mina has everything going for her, but her world is suddenly turned upside down when work sends her to her hometown in Tennessee to convince an old, stubborn restaurant owner to sell his property.

programme.title: Curious Caterer: Dying for Chocolate
programme.desc: Colorado caterer Goldy Berry teams with detective Tom Schultz to identify the ingredients that led to the mysterious death of her friend — and ends up discovering a hidden recipe for murder. Stars Nikki Deloach and Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Truly, Madly, Sweetly
programme.desc: When Natalie and Eric each inherit a share of an old bakery, this unlikely pair must decide what's in store for this historic landmark. When both of their careers come to a screeching halt, an opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job, Allie accepts a temp job as governess to Princess Theodora. A spark forms between Allie and Theodora's father Maximillion, the King of Winshire.

programme.title: Love in Design
programme.desc: In need of a shakeup on her home-makeover TV show, Hannah is sent to her New England hometown to renovate the historical Lewisburg Manor. Her old flame Jeff is assigned to make sure Hannah's design preserves the historical manor.

programme.title: Season for Love
programme.desc: When a talented chef returns to her Texas hometown, she winds up entering the town's famous BBQ cookoff and gets more than she bargained for when the surprise judge turns out to be her high school love. Stars Autumn Reeser.

programme.title: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs. Stars Amanda Schull and Peter Porte.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: Fired from her job as a reality TV host, Natalie returns home for Valentine's Day, only to find herself running the town festival's auction with her ex-fiance thanks to two scheming mothers. Bethany Joy Lenz, Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

programme.title: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth gets the opportunity of showing her dog in a New York dog show. The judge, Donovan Darcy, comes across as aristocratic and rude, and a chain of misunderstandings unfold, complicating their attraction to one another.

programme.title: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Donovan are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: Prince Leopold, heir to the throne of Cordinia, falls in love with Emily Taylor, a humble seamstress from Philadelphia. But the young prince's wishes are challenged by his mother, who wants him to marry royalty.

programme.title: Love, Romance & Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts? Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: The Dancing Detective: A Deadly Tango
programme.desc: A no-nonsense detective must reluctantly team up with a charismatic British dance star in order to solve a murder. Stars Lacey Chabert, Will Kemp.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Proposing Murder
programme.desc: Tess dives into Logan's murder investigation of her friend who was about to propose with her help. As she grows closer to the truth, she fears it could ruin everyone's happily ever after. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: His & Hers
programme.desc: Lawyers Mark and Dana are the perfect married couple until they find themselves on opposite sides of a highly public divorce case involving a warring reality show couple. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: When her high school boyfriend, a superstar baseball player, returns to town, a single-parent finds the inspiration to reinvent her struggling diner... and revisits the past to find something even better for the future.

programme.title: Home Turf
programme.desc: Cassidy is the president of a small college whose life is thrown for a loop when freshmen on the football team move into her home. Can Logan, the handsome coach, help smooth things over? Stars Nikki DeLoach, Warren Christie.

programme.title: Texas Two-Step
programme.desc: Olivia returns to Texas to help her aunt with her country music bar that's fallen on hard times and reconnects with Luke, her childhood sweetheart turned cowboy, and her passion for dancing. Stars Heather Hemmens, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Hearts of Winter
programme.desc: An interior designer brings new life to the house of a widower and his daughter and finds love in the process. Stars Jill Wagner, Victor Webster, Rukiya Bernard.

programme.title: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: NYC-based editor, Alex, is sent to an extreme sports outpost, to write a story. At first, she fails at everything, much to the chagrin of Cole, an extreme sports enthusiast who thinks this city girl should head back to New York.

programme.title: Love on the Danube: Love Song
programme.desc: Fellow cruise passengers, Sarah and Jack, play matchmaker with their music loving widowed parents, as they cruise down the Danube visiting European cities. Stars Nazneen Contractor, Wes Brown, Kathryn Drysdale, Catherine Disher.

programme.title: All's Fair in Love & Mahjong
programme.desc: A school nurse finds unexpected hope through teaching Mahjong, the centuries‑old Chinese game, which helps her build community and open her heart again. Stars Fiona Gubelmann, Paul Campbell, Yan-Kay Crystal Lowe.

programme.title: Haunted Wedding
programme.desc: Jana and Brian's plan to wed is in jeopardy when Angelique, a ghost in an 18th century wedding dress, vows to stop it. The couple must work together to save their wedding from disaster. Stars Janel Parrish, Dominic Sherwood.

programme.title: Fourth Down and Love
programme.desc: Sparks are reignited when a single mother and a pro football player coincidentally meet again on her daughter's flag football field after his career is interrupted by a sports injury. Stars Pascale Hutton, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Taking the Reins
programme.desc: A writer goes back to the family ranch to write an article about her passion for horses and discovers what ended her marriage and why she stopped riding horses. Stars Nikki DeLoach, Scott Porter.

programme.title: Because of Cupid
programme.desc: Best friends Naomi and Marcus participate in a Valentine's Day mocktail competition but things go awry when Cupid interferes with a love potion that affects Marcus and several of their friends. Stars Amy Groening, Evan Roderick.

programme.title: The Heiress and the Handyman
programme.desc: After losing her fortune, an heiress moves to a rural farm where she mistakes her handsome neighbor for the handyman. To live up to her family's legacy, he helps her compete at the county fair. Stars Jodie Sweetin, Corey Sevier.

programme.title: Autumn at Apple Hill
programme.desc: Elise is trying to keep her family inn afloat when the CFO of a major hotel chain checks in as a guest. Is he there to enjoy the fall season or try to take over her beloved inn? Stars Erin Cahill, Wes Brown.

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: Aunt Dee splits her candy shop between her niece, Maggie, and maple farmer, Dex. Following letters Dee left, the two uncover the reason for her decision, during the Sweet Autumn festival. Stars Nikki DeLoach & Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Moonlight in Vermont
programme.desc: When Fiona gets dumped she heads for a week in Vermont at her Dad's country Inn. There she runs into her ex with his new girlfriend. She strikes a deal with the Inn's chef, Derek, to be her "boyfriend" for the week.

programme.title: A Season to Blossom
programme.desc: A drifting aspiring writer returns to sell her late grandmother's bookstore, but its traditions - and her childhood crush - helps her rediscover her voice, her roots, and a love worth staying for. Stars Emily Tennant, Carlo Marks.

programme.title: Branching Out
programme.desc: To help build a family tree, single mom Amelia tracks down her daughter's biological father. It becomes a journey of trust, love, and discovering the meaning of family. Stars Sarah Drew, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: My Argentine Heart
programme.desc: Abril goes to Argentina to save her family ranch from being bought by her ex. But when outside forces threaten the ranch the pair must come together, rekindling their love in the process. Stars Julie Gonzalo, Juan Pablo Di Pace.

programme.title: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: Small-town baker, Kelly, gets a big surprise when she is invited to compete on a Valentine's Day baking show in New York City - and an even bigger surprise when she runs into her ex-fiance. Stars Erin Cahill, Brendan Penny.

programme.title: Savoring Paris
programme.desc: Disillusioned with her life, Ella embarks on a soul-searching journey to Paris where she navigates love, self-discovery and cheese amidst the enchanting backdrop of The City of Love. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz and Stanley Weber.

programme.title: The Santa Class
programme.desc: Kate North, the owner of a struggling Santa School, and her instructor, Dan, must help an amnesia-stricken Santa Claus regain his memories to save Christmas and hopefully her school as well. Stars Kimberley Sustad, Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Family for Christmas
programme.desc: When an ambitious anchorwoman makes on offhand wish to an office party Santa, she wakes up the next morning to find she is married to her college sweetheart, an event that has changed her world. Stars Lacey Chabert, Tyron Leitso.

programme.title: She's Making a List
programme.desc: Isabel needs to determine if a young girl belongs on the Naughty or Nice List; meanwhile, she's falling for the girl's father and learning that the world isn't so black and white. Starring Lacey Chabert, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: Haul Out the Holly
programme.desc: When Emily unexpectedly spends the holidays alone at her parents' house, their HOA insists that she participate in its many Christmas festivities. Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown, Stephen Tobolowsky, Melissa Peterman, Ellen Travolta.

programme.title: Haul Out the Holly: Lit Up
programme.desc: Emily and Jared lead the Evergreen Lane HOA toward another successful Christmas season. Lacey Chabert, Wes Brown.

programme.title: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Sara is the type of woman who prefers to sit on the sidelines at work, but when her big idea for a Christmas initiative is stolen, she makes a wish to Santa that she'll finally have the courage to stand up for herself.

programme.title: Merry Christmas, Ted Cooper!
programme.desc: An unlucky weatherman, Ted, continues to see the glass half full. He's determined to share his Christmas cheer with his high school crush, Hope, when they reconnect. Starring Robert Buckley and Kimberley Sustad.

programme.title: An Unexpected Christmas
programme.desc: A speech writer makes a deal with his ex-girlfriend to pretend they're a couple to save his family's Christmas. It's not long before both the ruse and their feelings catch up with them. Stars Bethany Joy Lenz, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Christmas Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Eager to avoid Christmas, Ella Neezer, a CEO, books an international trip that skips the holiday, until three spirits journey Ella through her life to rediscover her Christmas spirit. Erin Krakow, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Next Stop, Christmas
programme.desc: Angie is determined to spend Christmas alone but her usual commuter ride turns into a Christmas train that drops her off in her home town in 2011. Stars Lyndsy Fonseca, Chandler Massey, Lea Thompson, and Christopher Lloyd.

programme.title: Christmas with a Kiss
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help with her family's Christmas Carnival and romance ignites. A photo journalist curates a surprise reunion. Starring Mishael Morgan, Ronnie Rowe Jr. and Jaime M Callica.

programme.title: Christmas with the Singhs
programme.desc: Newly engaged Asha Singh and Jake O'Brien are excited to spend Christmas together, but their relationship is tested when their families' cultural and holiday traditions clash. Stars Anuja Joshi, Benjamin Hollingsworth.

programme.title: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica sends Christmas cards to those special to her- the aunt who raised her, her brother, an aging popstar, the teacher that inspired her, and her friend that always tells the truth. Stars Torrey DeVitto, Chad Michael Murray.

programme.title: An Alpine Holiday
programme.desc: Two vastly different sisters follow their late grandparent's steps and experience everything the Alps has to offer- including romance. Starring Ashley Williams, Laci J. Mailey, and Julien Samani.

programme.title: Jingle Bell Run
programme.desc: Self-described bookworm Avery is paired with retired hockey star Wes to compete in a holiday race across America. The team struggles through themed challenges until romance runs its course. Stars Ashley Williams, Andrew Walker.

programme.title: The Christmas Baby
programme.desc: A couple is surprised when a baby is mysteriously dropped off on their doorstep, forcing them to navigate a new terrain in their relationship and careers. Stars Ali Liebert , Katherine Barrell, and Barbara Niven.

programme.title: A Keller Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: Siblings Dylan, Cal, and Emory are at a crossroads in their lives and have drifted apart. To help, their parents plan a family Christmas river cruise visiting Germany and Austria. Stars Jonathan Bennett, Brandon Routh, Eden Sher.

programme.title: The Search for Mr. Christmas
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bennett and judge Melissa Peterman kick off the hunt for Hallmark's next leading man as ten new hunks reinvent Santa, then brave a ski-slope meet-cute with Janel Parrish- where spills steal the scene.

programme.title: A Very Merry Bridesmaid
programme.desc: Leah's 30th birthday is on Christmas Eve, the same day as her brother's wedding. Her childhood crush is back in town for the wedding and he is determined to make sure her birthday is celebrated. Stars Emily Osment, Casey Deidrick.

programme.title: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: When Anna offers a stranded mother and son shelter in a blizzard, she learns that they are the Royal Family of Galwick. Anna shows the Prince how they do Christmas in her hometown of Kentsbury. Stars Laura Osnes and Aaron Tveit.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries: Prediction Murder
programme.desc: When crime reporter Ruby Herring receives clues to a murder that happened five years earlier involving a local psychic, she joins forces with Detective Jake Killian to help crack the case. Stars Taylor Cole, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: Darrow & Darrow Pilot
programme.desc: Claire Darrow, a lawyer, fights for what's right, regardless of whether it makes her a dime. Joanna, Claire's estranged mother and a lawyer as well, would rather make a profit. They clash on nearly everything.

programme.title: Chronicle Mysteries: Recovered
programme.desc: Alex McPherson launches a podcast with a cold case from her past. With the help of local reporter, Drew Godfrey, new mysteries mix with old as the two work to recover what's been lost. Starring Alison Sweeney and Benjamin Ayres.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Newlywed and Dead
programme.desc: Photographer Allie Adams is shocked when the groom at a wedding she is covering is shot dead. What's even worse, is she must convince Detective Sam Acosta that her brother isn't the killer. Stars Alexa PenaVega, Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Dead Over Diamonds
programme.desc: Photographer Allie and Detective Sam's investigation into a priceless stolen necklace leads to danger and an unexpected death. Stars Alexa & Carlos PenaVega, Erik Estrada.

programme.title: Picture Perfect Mysteries: Exit Stage Death
programme.desc: Allie and Sam navigate the world of amateur theatrics as they pursue the killer of an actress. Their largest obstacle is trying to assess whether the cast members are lying or telling the truth. Starring Alexa & Carlos PenaVega.

programme.title: Nikki & Nora: Sister Sleuths
programme.desc: Fraternal twins Nikki and Nora are forced back into each other's lives when they inherit a detective agency. As they solve a murder, they realize their differences may be their greatest advantage. Stars Hunter King, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance is the prime suspect, successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case. Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove gets entangled in another case…and with Detective Kyle Carter. Can they read between the lines to find the murderer? Stars Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: MatchMaker Mysteries: The Art of the Kill
programme.desc: Angie Dove gets Det. Carter's attention by stumbling on a murder at an art museum. Angie's father Nick is on his own case, trying to solve a series of petty thefts at the museum. Danica McKellar, Victor Webster, Bruce Boxleitner.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: A Puzzle to Die For
programme.desc: After several of her puzzles are linked to the murder of an art gallery owner, a crossword puzzle editor teams up with a no nonsense detective to stop a killer in their midst. Stars Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Proposing Murder
programme.desc: Tess dives into Logan's murder investigation of her friend who was about to propose with her help. As she grows closer to the truth, she fears it could ruin everyone's happily ever after. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Abracadaver
programme.desc: During her birthday celebration, Tess and Logan find themselves swept up in a world that isn't always what it seems when the headlining magician at the Magic Manor winds up dead. Starring Lacey Chabert, Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Terminal Descent
programme.desc: When Tess prepares for a crossword challenge against a super computer, the engineer behind it is murdered, spurring her and Logan to seek answers before they become the next victims. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Crossword Mysteries: Riddle Me Dead
programme.desc: Tess gets invited to be a part of a popular game show, but when the host is unexpectedly murdered, she and Detective Logan O'Connor seek to uncover who was behind it all. Starring Lacey Chabert and Brennan Elliott.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pilot
programme.desc: Jennifer loves scouring garage sales to look for items to sell in her resell shop, but realizes a series of burglaries and a friend's murder may have a connection to the sales.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Jennifer Shannon has an eye for antiques and a mind for solving mysteries. When she buys a storage unit at auction, she has no idea she's opening the door to murder, and realizes the killer is after something in the storage unit.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Deadly Room
programme.desc: Jennifer's real-estate agent pal dies while trying to negate rumors about a home she's selling. The police believe there was no foul play, but Jennifer suspects that her friend was killed after she researches other deaths.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: In Jennifer Shannon's latest quest, she stumbles upon a 30 year-old cold case when she comes across a vintage wedding dress containing a clue. As Jenn tracks down the owner, she finds that the Groom mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: When Jenn's old pal Sandra becomes the prime suspect in a murder case, it'll be up to her to discover who done it before time runs out. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange and Steve Bacic.
